message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Proxy" as Proxy
participant "DataAccessor" as DataAccessor

activate Client
Client -> Proxy : new Proxy
activate Proxy
Client -> Proxy : GetData(Password)
activate DataAccessor
Proxy -> DataAccessor : GetData()
DataAccessor --> Proxy : return Data
deactivate DataAccessor
Proxy --> Client : return Valid
deactivate Proxy
deactivate Client

@enduml
```
